title: Foundation Models for Clinical Imaging Diagnosis: A 2025 Survey
abstract: This survey reviews foundation-model-based pipelines for multimodal imaging diagnosis and discusses adaptation, safety, and regulatory readiness.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Biomedical Evidence Synthesis
abstract: The paper proposes a retrieval-augmented architecture to reduce hallucinations in biomedical report generation and improve citation grounding.

title: Large Language Models in Academic Search Systems
abstract: A comparative study of ranking quality, query understanding, and explainability in LLM-assisted academic search systems.

title: Human-in-the-Loop Literature Review Automation
abstract: The work introduces an interaction model for collaborative evidence screening where users iteratively correct model uncertainty.

title: Knowledge Graph Enhanced Scholarly Recommendation
abstract: A recommendation model based on scholar-paper-venue graphs improving diversity and cold-start behavior.

title: Academic Writing With AI Assistants: Risks and Governance
abstract: This article analyzes policy options and institutional controls for responsible use of AI assistants in scholarly writing.

title: Cross-Lingual Retrieval for Chinese and English Scientific Corpora
abstract: A dense retrieval framework supports robust Chinese-English query transfer and improves recall on long-tail topics.

title: Practical Prompt Engineering for Research Synthesis
abstract: The paper evaluates prompt patterns for generating structured literature syntheses with transparent limitation sections.

title: Systematic Review Methods in the LLM Era
abstract: An updated methodological framework for systematic reviews that integrates machine-assisted screening and bias assessment.

title: Scientific Report Generation with Citation-Constrained Decoding
abstract: A decoding strategy enforces evidence citation constraints and improves factual consistency of generated reports.

title: Explainable Ranking Models for Scholarly Discovery
abstract: Introduces local explanation modules that increase user trust in ranking decisions for academic search interfaces.

title: A Handbook of Scientific Information Retrieval
abstract: A comprehensive handbook covering indexing, ranking, evaluation metrics, and knowledge discovery in scholarly corpora.

title: Benchmarking Citation Prediction in Computer Science
abstract: Builds a benchmark for citation prediction and identifies venue bias as a dominant confounder.

title: Topic Modeling for Emerging AI Safety Literature
abstract: Dynamic topic modeling reveals rapid fragmentation and convergence patterns in AI safety publications.

title: Academic Search Personalization with Privacy Guarantees
abstract: Personalized ranking with differential privacy preserves user intent while keeping utility losses bounded.

title: Data-Centric Evaluation of Research Assistant Agents
abstract: Proposes an evaluation suite focused on retrieval quality, source faithfulness, and user correction cost.

title: Meta-Analysis of AI for Medical Report Generation
abstract: A meta-analysis on diagnostic report generation models with subgroup analyses by imaging modality.

title: Research Workflow Orchestration with Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: Shows how specialized agents can coordinate retrieval, critique, and synthesis for complex literature reviews.

title: 蛋白质结构预测中的深度学习进展：从接触图到端到端模型
abstract: 本文系统回顾蛋白质结构预测的发展路径，重点分析残基接触图方法、Transformer 架构以及 AlphaFold 类模型在精度与泛化能力上的改进。

title: Protein Structure Modeling with Large Language Models and Geometric Priors
abstract: We propose a hybrid framework for protein structure modeling by combining sequence language models with geometric constraints and iterative refinement.

title: 基于 AlphaFold2 的蛋白质结构功能联合分析方法
abstract: 提出一种将蛋白质结构预测与功能位点识别联合建模的方法，在多个公开数据集上取得稳定提升。

title: Cryo-EM Guided Protein Fold Refinement for Complexes
abstract: A refinement workflow that integrates cryo-EM density constraints with neural folding priors to improve protein complex structures.
